quinoa-rice-lezzet.name: Quinoa Rice

ingredients.item: Carrot tomato, pepper, green pepper, carrot, mole eggplant

instructions: 1. Cook the Kinoa in a cooking pot and pour it into water.
2. Take the pişen kinoa on the edge.
3. Caramelize onions and garlic in olive oil in another small cooking pot.
4. Then add tomato sauce, vegetables and spices.
5. After adding the latest pizzan kinoa and stirring the rice a little, let it close the gold and brew.
